oneOf.x-runtime-constraint-description: Cannot use bone visibility feature with Vanilla geometries

origin.x-runtime-constraint-description: There are different constraints for different indexes, please refer to member help for more details

minecraft:placement_direction.x-runtime-constraint-description: "y_rotation_offset" can only be used when "minecraft:cardinal_direction" and/or "minecraft:facing_direction" are enabled in "enabled_states". and "blocks_to_corner_with" can only be used when "minecraft:corner_and_cardinal_direction" is enabled in "enabled_states".

components.x-runtime-constraint-description: Blocks with precipitation interactions "snow_log_no_collision" must have collision box disabled
